commands: vp dlx --help # should show help message
vp dlx -s cowsay hello # should run cowsay with npm exec
vp dlx -s cowsay@1.6.0 hello # should run specific version
vp dlx -s -p cowsay -p lolcatjs cowsay hello # should run with multiple packages
vp dlx -s -p cowsay -c "echo hello-from-shell | cowsay" # should run shell mode command
